states.name: Ossia
states.title: Bewitching Devil
states.description:
The autumn harvest festival. Children flock to the streets, dressed as evil spirits to protect themselves from the real evil. A single grown woman can be seen among them, however, her body and mind differ greatly in age. Though an adult in appearance, in spirit she's no different than the children pestering passers-by for treats. It is no surprise, then, that she too wanted to wear a costume—even if she couldn't quite find the right size.
"How do I look, Mama? If you don't say 'cute', I will play a trick on you...!"

states.name: Ossia
states.title: Bewitching Devil
states.description:
Due to the size of the gap between her physical and mental age, or maybe due to the enormous power dwelling in her body, her mind is trying to catch up abnormally fast. But there is a price for defying the natural order, that is how this world works. And the price for her rapid growth—or rather evolution—was ethics and morals.
"Will you play with me...? No, I will make you my playmate myself, hahaha..."
What makes people unable to look away is that hint of childishness mixed with all the seductiveness, that bit of charm among all the innocence. It shows in her looks, her words, and seems to monopolize the thoughts of those who meet her.

states.name: Ossia
states.title: Bewitching Devil
states.description:
At last, her childlike mind has reached maturity. She rests, surrounded by a rich assortment of sweets and desserts. If you try to look away, she'll fix you with a challenging gaze, as if asking if you really don't want more.
She is not human, she's a creature made to resemble humans and surpass them—it is only natural, then, that she looks down on us. "If you think you, a human, can devour me, if you think you can hurt me, come and try," says her prideful, bewitching smile.
